name: exact-tie-preserves-input-order
description: C3R-2 (Minor, Car 3 review round 1): two records for one dispatch subject with the SAME kind and the SAME exact instant have no precedence or chronological basis to pick a winner - the tie-break must be DETERMINISTIC and DOCUMENTED, not an accident of implementation. pwsh's Sort-Object gained -Stable (this fix cycle) and Go already used sort.SliceStable; both preserve the INPUT order of equal elements, so the record listed FIRST in input.records wins. Provenance: OBSERVED - expected block generated by running the FIXED (-Stable) scripts/Detect-Dispatches.ps1 at the C3R-2 fix-cycle commit on this exact input (2026-07-23), then reviewed for correctness (input order preserved, never reversed or arbitrary).
